AquaFunded 50% OFF Welcome Deal

AquaFunded is welcoming new traders with an exclusive 50% OFF sitewide discount. Use code WELCOME at checkout to halve the cost of any forex challenge, and qualify for a $100 extra payout bonus on larger account sizes — making this the best possible entry point for traders who are joining AquaFunded for the first time.

AquaFunded is a professional forex prop firm built around high-quality execution, a trader-friendly challenge structure, and competitive profit splits. The firm has established itself as a trusted name in the funded trading space by prioritizing transparent rules and fast payouts for verified funded traders.

With code WELCOME, new users receive 50% off any challenge tier across the AquaFunded lineup. The $100 extra payout bonus is available for traders who select larger account sizes and reach their first payout milestone. This combination of upfront savings and bonus rewards makes it one of the most generous new-user packages in the industry.

AquaFunded offers flexible trading conditions across multiple platforms, including MT5, cTrader, and TradeLocker. The firm's challenge rules are designed to reward consistent, disciplined trading, and there are no restrictions on trading styles beyond standard risk management parameters. Profit splits are competitive, and the payout process is streamlined for funded traders.

To activate this deal, click through the affiliate link above to the AquaFunded website, register as a new user, select your account size, and enter WELCOME at checkout. The 50% discount will be applied immediately. This code is exclusively for new users and cannot be combined with other promotional codes.
